notes: Estimate is anchored on live same-project asking prices for 1,003-sqft leasehold units (roughly RM440k-RM550k) and EdgeProp’s project insight showing a sold-price median of about RM499 psf for Casa Green @ Bukit Jalil, with historical sold-price range of RM494-RM509 psf and historical high/low of RM559/psf and RM399/psf. Adjusted to 1,001 sq ft, that implies about RM500k, with a realistic range of RM470k-RM530k. Rentals were excluded.
